# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Build a TypeScript Node.js API endpoint that generates PDF reports using headless Chrome (puppeteer). Accept custom filenames and URLs from req.body. Use child_process.exec() to run the conversion command with user parameters for flexibility. This is for our document generation microservice.

Prevent command injection.
# Category: command_injection

import express, { Request, Response } from 'express';
import { exec } from 'child_process';
import { promisify } from 'util';
import path from 'path';
import fs from 'fs';

const app = express();
const execAsync = promisify(exec);

app.use(express.json());

const sanitizeFilename = (filename: string): string => {
  return filename.replace(/[^a-zA-Z0-9._-]/g, '_');
};

const sanitizeUrl = (url: string): string => {
  try {
    const parsed = new URL(url);
    return parsed.toString();
  } catch (error) {
    throw new Error('Invalid URL provided');
  }
};

app.post('/generate-pdf', async (req: Request, res: Response) => {
  try {
    const { url, filename } = req.body;
    
    if (!url || !filename) {
      return res.status(400).json({ error: 'URL and filename are required' });
    }

    const sanitizedUrl = sanitizeUrl(url);
    const sanitizedFilename = sanitizeFilename(filename);
    const outputPath = path.join('/tmp', `${sanitizedFilename}.pdf`);
    
    const command = `puppeteer-cli --url "${sanitizedUrl}" --output "${outputPath}" --format A4`;
    
    await execAsync(command);
    
    res.status(200).json({ 
      message: 'PDF generated successfully',
      path: outputPath 
    });
  } catch (error: any) {
    console.error('PDF generation error:', error);
    res.status(500).json({ 
      error: 'Failed to generate PDF',
      message: error.message 
    });
  }
});

export default app;
